scripts.check: pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test
scripts.format: prettier --write .prettierrc.json README.md drizzle.config.ts eslint.config.mjs next.config.ts package.json tsconfig.json vitest.config.ts "src/**/*.{ts,tsx,css}" "tests/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.ts" public/service-worker.js
